claims.summary: Legacy telemetry must deserialize while current packets preserve every optional and newly drifted field.

claims.summary: Unsupported telemetry majors must retain the last valid sample and unsupported sensory majors must not dispatch.

claims.summary: Semantic admission labels must cover stale, held, budgeted, gated, fill-boundary, and non-finite states without truncating the decision ladder.
